parameters.query:
WITH entrada AS (
  SELECT
    $1::varchar AS patient_phone,
    lower(regexp_replace(trim(COALESCE($2::text, '')), '[^a-zA-Z0-9_]+', '_', 'g')) AS preference_key,
    trim(COALESCE($3::text, '')) AS preference_value,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($4::text, '')), ''), 'atendimento') AS source
),
validacao AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM entrada
  WHERE patient_phone IS NOT NULL
    AND patient_phone <> ''
    AND preference_key <> ''
    AND preference_value <> ''
),
upsert_usuario AS (
  INSERT INTO {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.usuarios (
    telefone,
    metadados,
    primeira_interacao,
    ultima_interacao,
    total_interacoes
  )
  SELECT
    v.patient_phone,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'preferencias', jsonb_build_object(v.preference_key, v.preference_value),
      'preferencias_atualizado_em', to_jsonb(now()),
      'preferencias_fonte', to_jsonb(v.source)
    ),
    now(),
    now(),
    1
  FROM validacao v
  ON CONFLICT (telefone) DO UPDATE
  SET
    metadados = jsonb_set(
      jsonb_set(
        jsonb_set(
          COALESCE(usuarios.metadados, '{}'::jsonb),
          '{preferencias}',
          COALESCE(usuarios.metadados->'preferencias', '{}'::jsonb),
          true
        ),
        ARRAY['preferencias', (SELECT preference_key FROM validacao LIMIT 1)],
        to_jsonb((SELECT preference_value FROM validacao LIMIT 1)),
        true
      ),
      '{preferencias_atualizado_em}',
      to_jsonb(now()),
      true
    ) || jsonb_build_object('preferencias_fonte', (SELECT source FROM validacao LIMIT 1)),
    ultima_interacao = now(),
    atualizado_em = now()
  RETURNING
    id AS usuario_id,
    telefone,
    metadados
)
SELECT
  u.usuario_id,
  u.telefone,
  (SELECT preference_key FROM validacao LIMIT 1) AS preference_key,
  (SELECT preference_value FROM validacao LIMIT 1) AS preference_value,
  (u.metadados->'preferencias') AS preferencias,
  u.metadados AS usuario_metadados
FROM upsert_usuario u;
